question: what is the total sales order value
business_context: total sales order value from ORDR represents committed sales amount
embedding_text: total sales order value total so amount sales commitment ordered value sum orders
sql: SELECT SUM(T0."DocTotal") AS "total_sales_order_value" FROM ORDR T0 WHERE COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y'

question: how many sales orders are open
business_context: open sales orders are ORDR rows where DocStatus is O and not cancelled
embedding_text: count open sales orders how many pending so open so pending orders
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "open_sales_order_count" FROM ORDR T0 WHERE T0."DocStatus" = 'O' AND COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y'

question: which customers have the highest sales order value
business_context: group sales order committed value by customer from ORDR
embedding_text: top customers by sales order value customer wise so amount client spend ordered value ranking
sql: SELECT T0."CardCode", T0."CardName", SUM(T0."DocTotal") AS "total_order_value" FROM ORDR T0 WHERE COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y' GROUP BY T0."CardCode", T0."CardName" ORDER BY "total_order_value" DESC LIMIT 10

question: show top sales orders
intent: rank sales order documents by value
business_context: retrieve individual ORDR sales order records ordered by document total
embedding_text: top sales orders highest sales order value biggest orders rank order documents order list top 5 orders
sql: SELECT T0."DocNum", T0."CardCode", T0."CardName", T0."DocDate", T0."DocTotal", T0."DocStatus" FROM ORDR T0 WHERE COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y' ORDER BY T0."DocTotal" DESC LIMIT 10

question: show overdue sales orders
business_context: overdue sales orders are open non-cancelled ORDR rows with DocDueDate before current date
embedding_text: overdue sales orders delayed so due date passed open orders customer delivery delay
sql: SELECT T0."DocNum", T0."CardCode", T0."CardName", T0."DocDueDate", T0."DocTotal" FROM ORDR T0 WHERE T0."DocStatus" = 'O' AND COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y' AND T0."DocDueDate" < CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY T0."DocDueDate" ASC LIMIT 10

question: which products have the most pending sales order quantity
business_context: pending sales quantity comes from RDR1 OpenQty for open sales order lines
embedding_text: top pending items sales order open quantity item wise pending so quantity not delivered
sql: SELECT T0."ItemCode", T0."Dscription", SUM(T0."OpenQty") AS "pending_quantity" FROM RDR1 T0 JOIN ORDR T1 ON T1."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry" WHERE T1."DocStatus" = 'O' AND COALESCE(T1."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y' GROUP BY T0."ItemCode", T0."Dscription" ORDER BY "pending_quantity" DESC LIMIT 10

question: what is the total AR invoice amount
business_context: AR invoice value from OINV represents actual sales revenue billed to customers
embedding_text: total ar invoice amount total sales invoice value customer bill revenue sum invoices
sql: SELECT SUM(T0."DocTotal") AS "total_ar_invoice_amount" FROM OINV T0 WHERE COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y'

question: how much AR invoice balance is receivable
business_context: balance receivable is the uncollected revenue on OINV
embedding_text: ar invoice balance receivable unpaid outstanding customer bills pending collection balance due
sql: SELECT SUM(COALESCE(T0."BalanceDue", T0."DocTotal" - COALESCE(T0."PaidToDate", 0))) AS "total_balance_receivable" FROM OINV T0 WHERE COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y'

question: which customers have bought the most
business_context: group actual invoiced customer revenue by customer from OINV
embedding_text: top customers by ar invoice value customer wise invoice amount sales revenue ranking highest spending customers
sql: SELECT T0."CardCode", T0."CardName", SUM(T0."DocTotal") AS "total_invoice_value" FROM OINV T0 WHERE COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y' GROUP BY T0."CardCode", T0."CardName" ORDER BY "total_invoice_value" DESC LIMIT 10

question: which products are selling the most
business_context: top selling item quantity comes from INV1 quantity joined to OINV
embedding_text: top selling products best selling items highest revenue items item wise sales product ranking invoiced quantity
sql: SELECT T0."ItemCode", T0."Dscription", SUM(T0."Quantity") AS "sold_quantity", SUM(T0."LineTotal") AS "total_revenue" FROM INV1 T0 JOIN OINV T1 ON T1."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry" WHERE COALESCE(T1."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y' GROUP BY T0."ItemCode", T0."Dscription" ORDER BY "total_revenue" DESC LIMIT 10

question: how many sales orders today
business_context: count of ORDR rows with DocDate equal to current date
embedding_text: sales orders today today orders count today order volume daily orders
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "orders_today" FROM ORDR T0 WHERE T0."DocDate" = CURRENT_DATE AND COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y'

question: compare sales order value and AR invoice value
intent: compare committed sales order value with actual AR invoice value
business_context: sales orders are commitments from ORDR, AR invoices are actual customer billing from OINV
embedding_text: compare sales order value ar invoice value ordered vs invoiced commitment vs revenue
sql: SELECT (SELECT SUM(T0."DocTotal") FROM ORDR T0 WHERE COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y') AS "total_sales_order_value", (SELECT SUM(T0."DocTotal") FROM OINV T0 WHERE COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y') AS "total_ar_invoice_value"

question: show latest sales orders
business_context: retrieve most recent ORDR records ordered by date
embedding_text: latest sales orders recent orders show orders list orders fetch orders display orders
sql: SELECT T0."DocNum", T0."CardCode", T0."CardName", T0."DocDate", T0."DocTotal", T0."DocStatus" FROM ORDR T0 WHERE COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y' ORDER BY T0."DocDate" DESC LIMIT 10

question: show latest AR invoices
business_context: retrieve most recent OINV records ordered by date
embedding_text: latest ar invoices recent invoices show invoices list invoices fetch invoices sales invoices
sql: SELECT T0."DocNum", T0."CardCode", T0."CardName", T0."DocDate", T0."DocTotal", T0."DocStatus" FROM OINV T0 WHERE COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y' ORDER BY T0."DocDate" DESC LIMIT 10

question: show latest sales returns
business_context: retrieve most recent ORDN sales return records ordered by date
embedding_text: latest sales returns recent customer returns show returns list return documents
sql: SELECT T0."DocNum", T0."CardCode", T0."CardName", T0."DocDate", T0."DocTotal", T0."DocStatus" FROM ORDN T0 WHERE COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y' ORDER BY T0."DocDate" DESC LIMIT 10

question: which products are returned the most
business_context: top returned items come from RDN1 quantity joined to ORDN
embedding_text: top returned products sales return items highest returned quantity item wise customer returns
sql: SELECT T0."ItemCode", T0."Dscription", SUM(T0."Quantity") AS "returned_quantity", SUM(T0."LineTotal") AS "total_return_value" FROM RDN1 T0 JOIN ORDN T1 ON T1."DocEntry" = T0."DocEntry" WHERE COALESCE(T1."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y' GROUP BY T0."ItemCode", T0."Dscription" ORDER BY "returned_quantity" DESC LIMIT 10

question: what is the total sales return value
business_context: total sales return value from ORDN represents customer returned sales amount
embedding_text: total sales return value total customer returns amount returned goods credit value
sql: SELECT SUM(T0."DocTotal") AS "total_sales_return_value" FROM ORDN T0 WHERE COALESCE(T0."CANCELED", 'N') <> 'Y'

question: fetch the AR invoice linked to sales order 504632
intent: find AR invoice created from a sales order
business_context: AR invoices created from sales orders are linked through invoice line BaseEntry and BaseType 17
embedding_text: ar invoice linked to sales order invoice from sales order base entry base type 17 related invoice fetch linked document
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2."DocEntry", T2."DocNum", T2."DocDate", T2."CardCode", T2."CardName", T2."DocTotal" FROM ORDR T0 JOIN INV1 T1 ON T1."BaseEntry" = T0."DocEntry" AND T1."BaseType" = 17 JOIN OINV T2 ON T2."DocEntry" = T1."DocEntry" WHERE T0."DocEntry" = 504632 LIMIT 10
